## Summary

-
-

## Type of Change

- [ ] New hook script
- [ ] Hook enhancement
- [ ] Supporting script change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor

## Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck` passes on modified shell scripts
- [ ] Hook exits 0 with empty stdin
- [ ] Hook exits 0 with valid JSON stdin
- [ ] BATS tests added/updated if applicable
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (use `$HOME` or `~/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
